claim: ChatGPT and MCP apps use double iframes where the outer iframe loads a lightweight script from a controlled subdomain, and the inner iframe loads the actual app HTML via srcdoc, with each subdomain scoped to prevent cross-app storage collisions
actionable: When building MCP apps, declare all external domains your view touches in the MCP app metadata to avoid submission rejection
source_title: Why MCP and ChatGPT Apps Use Double Iframes

claim: Content Security Policy (CSP) prevents third-party scripts from executing in ChatGPT, requiring script-src directives to use nonce-signed code; relaxing CSP allows apps to read ChatGPT's localStorage and cookies
actionable: Use CSP inspector tools to detect which domains your views actually access and ensure all are declared in your MCP metadata before production deployment
source_title: Why MCP and ChatGPT Apps Use Double Iframes

claim: Sandbox attributes on iframes with allow-same-origin restore origin indexing (localStorage, cookies, indexedDB) but create a classic sandbox escape vulnerability
actionable: Never use allow-same-origin in sandboxed iframes unless you fully understand the security implications; use distinct subdomains instead
source_title: Why MCP and ChatGPT Apps Use Double Iframes

claim: The double iframe pattern is the same architecture Facebook shipped for their app marketplace and is a proven solution for rendering untrusted third-party UI
actionable: Use the double iframe pattern when building third-party UI in constrained environments rather than trying simpler alternatives that introduce security risks
source_title: Why MCP and ChatGPT Apps Use Double Iframes

claim: Skybridge (open source framework) provides a CSP inspector that diffs declared domains in MCP metadata against actual network calls in development, catching missing domains before production
actionable: Use Skybridge's CSP inspector tool during development to catch domain declaration mismatches before submitting to ChatGPT app store
source_title: Why MCP and ChatGPT Apps Use Double Iframes
